theme_and_archetype.reasoning: The brand requires a 'billion-dollar technology startup' feel (Linear/Vercel) combined with high-end fashion. The dark mode (#09090B) establishes the technical authority, while the dramatic lighting and crisp white text bring in the luxury editorial feel.
theme_and_archetype.aesthetic: Linear Look / Humanist Tech, combining subtle technical blueprint grids with specular highlights and deep cinematic shadows.

headings.usage: H1, H2, H3, large numerical metrics, and key structural elements.

body.usage: Paragraphs, UI labels, small metadata, lists.

mono.usage: Technical accents, overlines, subtle data points (Optional, for tech credibility).

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-semibold tracking-tighter text-white
hierarchy.h2: text-3xl sm:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-medium tracking-tight text-white

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Minimalist density. Lots of whitespace between sections (py-24 to py-32).

surface_styles.cards: bg-[#111827] rounded-2xl border border-white/10 shadow-2xl overflow-hidden p-8 transition-colors duration-300 hover:border-white/20 hover:bg-[#1E293B]

patterns.scroll: Smooth scrolling with Lenis for premium weighty feel.
patterns.metrics: Framer Motion useInView with useMotionValue to animate count-ups.
patterns.hover: Subtle translation (-translate-y-1), border illumination, and text color brightening.
patterns.entrances: Staggered fade-up (y: 20, opacity: 0 -> y: 0, opacity: 1) on section scroll.

global_rules.data_testid: MANDATORY on all interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs, accordions).

header.components: Logo, Nav Links (visible on desktop), CTA Button ('Solicitar Demonstração' -> wa.me/5562900000000).

hero.layout: 2-column split (grid lg:grid-cols-2). Left: Typography & Actions. Right: Fashion model in tech office.

content.headline: Transformamos fotos dos seus produtos em conteúdo que vende.
content.subheadline: Envie apenas as fotos da sua coleção. Nossa inteligência artificial cria imagens, vídeos, legendas e campanhas prontas para Instagram.

hero.visual: Right side image must fade softly into the dark background using a gradient mask to avoid hard edges.

social_proof.interaction: Animated count-up using Framer Motion when scrolled into view.

how_it_works.layout: Interactive vertical timeline or tabbed bento layout.
how_it_works.visual: Use the abstract blue wave mesh as a subtle background texture behind the steps.

services.layout: Bento Grid Mode A (Tetris Grid). Asymmetrical layout.
services.card_style: Deep #111827 cards, rounded-2xl, soft inner glow on hover.

pricing.highlight_strategy: The TITAN tier gets a primary blue border (#2563EB), a subtle primary blue glow (box-shadow), and an 'Mais Popular' overline.

faq.component: Shadcn Accordion (customized for dark mode, no white backgrounds, border-b border-white/10).

final_cta.layout: Full width banner with absolute positioned background image.
final_cta.content: Sua loja merece vender mais. Veja como a Titan pode transformar suas fotos em conteúdo profissional.
final_cta.visual: Background uses the editorial fashion portrait. MUST have a heavy dark overlay (bg-[#09090B]/80) to ensure text is readable (APCA contrast).

images.description: Stylish woman in a contemporary office hallway. Represents the 'fashion model inside premium Titan office' concept.
A dramatic portrait of a woman in a dimly lit setting. Editorial fashion style. Used as full-width background with dark overlay.

images.category: How It Works Background / UI Texture
images.description: Abstract blue wavy lines representing AI flow and technology.

technical_rules.components: Shadcn UI (highly customized to match dark aesthetic, pure HTML+Tailwind for complex grids)
technical_rules.forms_and_links: All CTA buttons pointing to WhatsApp must use href='https://wa.me/5562900000000' target='_blank' rel='noopener noreferrer'
technical_rules.routing: React Router or standard anchor links for single page scrolling.
technical_rules.testing: Ensure all buttons, accordion items, and links have data-testid attributes.
